creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
stefan      2011-09-01 13:11:46 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    security/hmap        Makefile pkg-plist 
    security/hmap/files  patch-hmap.py 
  Log:
  - remove dead mirror
  - install license with LICENSE knob
  - use USE_PYTHON instead of RUN_DEPENDS
  - use DOS2UNIX instead of homemade commands
  - use DATADIR instead of share/hmap
  - use COPYTREE_SHARE for copying group of files
  - fix plist
  - bump PORTREVISION because of plist changes
  
  PR:             156693
  Submitted by:   Ruslan Mahmatkhanov <cvs-src@yandex.ru>
  Approved by:    maintainer timeout (>4 months)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.4       +16 -18    ports/security/hmap/Makefile
  1.2       +1 -1      ports/security/hmap/files/patch-hmap.py
  1.2       +30 -31    ports/security/hmap/pkg-plist
